items: PATHING
Updated pathing to be in a 50x50 sub grid. Before it was on the 100x100 main grid
Added a new dynamic and emergent road system
Builders, Workers, and Senders favor moving on roads
They also rather no walk on farms
Fixed several issues related to pathing edge-cases
Senders are no longer able to walk outside the world
WORLD GEN:
Mountains now generally generate with more space between them
But Mountains on dry areas generate in pairs
Trees now generate in forests instead of just sprinkled randomly
Improved lakes generation and appearance
Added rivers
Bunch of world generation steps are now handled better
UX/UI/INPUT:
You can now use space bar to active-pause the game
You can hold a building button to reserve resources, which stops having to quick-time the building before the resources was consumed
When in a menu ESC now cancels instead of opening the pause menu on top, still opens the pause menu if you have nothing else open
Right mouse button now only cancels on tap, so you can use to move the camera while placing a building
The Tutorial is fully updated and less verbose
Added various time of year notifications
Deterioration message now waits for at least 20% damage in order to not spam you
Fixed several UI buttons behaving in unintended ways
the Sender menu now has a green start and red stop button to activate a new sender, or to stop its route
The farmhouse shows an additional 3x3 preview when placing it
Changed the default font to something easier to read
Made all font sizes more consistent
The in-world display of actor data now reacts to UI Scale like all other UI elements.
MISC:
Buildings Upgrades; now they all start at 'rustic'. and can be upgraded to 'normal'
The Expand menu is now called Improve
You can selected Building upgrades from the Improve menu
Building prices are now fixed
The settlement now has a cap on how much gold it can store, based on its size
Improved how the Start Location is selected
Increased the visible radius around the Start Location
Settlements start deactivated and become activated when they've received both food and materials from any source
Adjusted the distance from the settlement at which you're allowed to build things
Removed materials number from mountains, they are infinite now
Added a Fishinghut building to get food out of lakes
Added a Bridge building to cross rivers better
Added a Guardtower building that's not yet fully implemented...
The Build menu now has a Production and a Projects Tab
Many recurrent operations have been optimized
Fixed bug with settlement incorrectly consuming and generating per module instead of as a whole
Fixed bug with mountains not clearing the slot if a settlement died and stonecamps were destroyed
Fixed bug with senders not resetting correctly if a settlement they were trading with was abandoned
And there's also a thousand other smaller tweaks and changes all over the place!
During the 1st year, settlement deterioration has a 50% chance of not causing damage
Fixed bottom screen edge panning being blocked by the UI
Viewing a message now correctly exits out of other actions first
The Deterioration notification now mentions lacking resources to generate gold
Fixed not using game custom icon
Fixed various typos and localization issues
Tweaked balanced for a more consistent pace
Senders 20% slower in the snow
You can now select an upgrade on Civilization level up
Monument now grants experience instead of an upgrade
Upgrades are now explained, and can be seen on the Overview panel
New arid biome that takes at least 30% of the world
Each tile now has a % of how wet-dry it is
Forestlodge produces slower on arid biomes
Farmhouse cannot be placed on tiles that are too dry
Added time of year and seasons
Game now tracks time of year instead of clock time
Weather is now tied to seasons
Farmhouse works faster during rain, and slower during snow
Settlements now deteriorate if they can't produce gold
You can now get a Game Over if you run out of settlements
New messages for important game events
Settlements now produce 1 gold per module instead of 2
But Gold production speed is also much 80% faster
Prices and experience are adjusted to account for gold generation
Settlement expansions can now only be placed within 2 tiles of the center
Settlements can be placed closer to each other and to mountains
Switched to hardware cursor
Added arrow keys to control the camera
Added mouse wheel and home/end keys to control the camera zoom
The demo now ends in a cliffhanger before late-game
Lots of art tweaks and improvements
Improved sound for Sender instruction UI
When you order a new settlement the builder is now a whole group
Generation of valid placement grid is faster
Updated Upgrades System. Now earned at level up and from monuments
Farmhouses now have 3x3 tiles footprint (32 farms in the 8 spaces around the Farmhouse)
Farmhouse best production time when all 32 farms could be created around it
Top of hills is now floor colored so they aren't confused as mountains
Moved some UI panels to the right of the screen
Fixed missing text from tutorial last step that tells you the temple gets harder to fill up the closer you are to completing it
Added additional steps to tutorial last section for clarity.
Made the temple 20% easier to complete
Added food/material/gold icons
Gold needed for hamlet-to-village upgrade lowered to 30, from 40
Balanced Woodcamp and Forestlodge production seepds
Increased number of Senders per Settlement to 9, up from 6
Lowered the price of Senders to make them usable earlier
Fixed issue with Ruins sometimes generating right next to the Temple, and thus be unusable to build a monument on top
Production buildings don't stockpile past 15 units per type anymore
Fixed issue with starting area not being close enough to a Mountain
Updated buildings descriptions so their role is clearer
Fixed incorrectly assigned spanish loc text
Added settlement-colored meeple on UI, will continue iterating on this
Made Sender UI's destination easier to navigate
Fixed temple first segment completing at 1/5 instead of 1/4
Extended tutorial to include completing the temple
Reworked how weather events works, from milder to harsher as you complete the temple, instead of just being a fixed event type
Removed light changes related to temple progress
Improved buildings text for clarity
Added option on welcome popup to skip tutorial on start
Improved prices color so can or can't afford is clearer
Updated 'Welcome' and 'How to Play' texts
Small balance tweak
Hotkey at victory now works correctly
Fixed a few typos
Disabled gamepad auto detection
Demo 1.0 is released.
New Onboarding and Objectives Panel (v1)
Improved Camera Zoom smoothness
Added subtle thunder sounds to the lategame soundscape
Farms now ramp up faster and reach max speed earlier.
Fix flipped hotkeys on expand menu
Various tweaks and fixes
SETTLEMENT POINTS renamed to CIVILIZATION LEVEL, to reflect how it actually works now
Further improved the camera edge panning
Shifted keyboard hotkeys to better fit QERTZ layouts: ZXCV to XCVB.
Fixed issue with Edge Panning annoyingly moving the camera after you pressed a button near the edge
Temple progress bar is now visually split in four
Increased building description font size a bit
New mouse cursor
Farm max yield at 32 farms, down from 36
Can no longer edge-pan the camera while in the victory screen or during initial popup.
Added notifications back in, but simplified
Fixed exp orb flying to corner not visible
Edge Panning is now prevented when the cursor is over UI buttons
Updated the How To Play information
Game start with a How To Play window (Placeholder for the real Onboarding)
Updated buildings thumbnails and descriptions
Senders no longer destroy trees as they move
When settlement fails to generate gold it slows down for a few cycles
Fixed a pathing bug affecting senders when production and settlement were too close
Added Camera Edge Panning
Added Edge Pan and Bloom settings
Various cloud clearance radius tweaks
Additional resource balance tweaks
Additional Art and UI tweaks
Removed notifications widget for now.
New experience system that replaces Civ Points
Building things now grants experience
Start area is now automatically selected
Only start area is clear of clouds
New Waypost building that is used to clear clouds
Forestlodge placement distances now similar to Woodcamp
Added Raining and Snowing weather states
Added per buildings prerequisite conditions
Re-ordered Buildings list so Woodcamp is first
Large balance pass
Many art tweaks
Added Changelog
Added Gold production timer to settlement
Added Camera Zoom Control
Added Material cost to Buildings
Added Food cost to Senders
Renamed Hunterslodge to Forestlodge
Start of Playtest
